creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
Please close this PR as it is a duplicate of 111014.  Web PR was
giving me an error when submitting this PR.

On 3/29/07, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org
<FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/111016'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
>
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=111016
>
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       www/joomla - pkg-plist not using %%JOOMLA_DIR%% for substitutions

DISCLAIMER:
No electrons were mamed while sending this message. Only slightly bruised.
